name: Rainvare
headerTaglineTwo: I'm R. Indira Valentina Réquiz Molina
headerTaglineThree: AI and Data Especialist | Software Developer | Linguist | Researcher of Korean Studies (ALADAA).

services.title: Frontend Development
services.description: I create the structure of web pages using HTML, style them with CSS and Sass, and make them interactive with JavaScript. I have experience working with libraries such as Bootstrap, jQuery, React, Redux, and D3, ensuring dynamic and responsive user interfaces.

services.title: Backend Development
services.description: I develop backend solutions using Node.js, Java, and Go. I specialize in creating microservices with Spring Boot and implement security solutions using Keycloak. I work with NoSQL databases like MongoDB to ensure efficient data management. Additionally, I utilize AWS and cloud computing services to provide scalable and reliable backend solutions.

services.title: AI Development and Machine Learning
services.description: Leveraging my expertise as an AI and Machine Learning specialist, I can build intelligent systems and perform complex machine learning analysis. I use Azure and Databricks to enhance my AI and machine learning capabilities. From predictive modeling to machine learning algorithms, I provide insights and solutions tailored to your business needs.

services.title: Data Analysis and data Science
services.description: I specialize in transforming raw data into actionable insights. Using Python and R, I conduct thorough analyses and create data visualizations with libraries such as ggplot. My analytical skills help businesses make informed decisions, optimize operations, and achieve their strategic goals.

services.title: Project and Team Management
services.description: My background includes leadership positions as a Product Leader, Scrum Master, and Technical Lead, utilizing agile methodologies to manage project requirements, task creation, and tracking effectively. My services encompass strategic planning, resource allocation, risk mitigation, stakeholder communication, requirements gathering, task creation and tracking, and process improvement initiatives.

services.title: Research
services.description: I am an experienced researcher specializing in comparative literature, with a particular focus on Venezuelan, Latin American, and Korean literature. My work includes writing scholarly articles and delivering lectures at universities and research institutes. As a Research Associate at the Center for the Study of Africa and Asia at the University of Andes in Venezuela, and a member of ALADAA - Latin American Association of Asian and African Studies, I am actively involved in scholarly communities dedicated to the study endeavors are driven by a commitment to fostering cross-cultural dialogue and advancing the field of comparative literature.

services.title: Languages
services.description: I offer comprehensive language services, drawing from extensive experience teaching languages in schools and universities, educational materials, business documents, or literary works translated. My expertise spans across language acquisition research and practical instruction for both children and adults. With proficiency in ten languages—Spanish (my native language), English, Portuguese, Korean, French, Italian, German, Sign Language, some Arabic, and a bit of Chinese—.

aboutpara:
My name is R. Indira Valentina Réquiz, a literature enthusiast turned software developer, born in Venezuela in 1991 and currently living in Argentina. I have a degree in Literature from the Universidad Central de Venezuela, where my passion for languages, both human and mechanical, grew.

As a software developer, I combine my love for literature with the complexities of coding and research, because I believe it is possible to integrate both worlds. Every day I immerse myself more and more in new technologies and I like to be in constant training. But, in my free time, I also enjoy knitting, lutherie, reading Isaac Asimov's works and watching kdramas. The rest of the time I volunteer in environmental organizations and children's homes.
